zh.lifeSummary: 當William Crook於大約1550年出生在英國藍卡爾博爾頓 勒 波斯 聖 彼得時，他的父親George Crooke31歲，母親Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe22歲。他於大約1565年與Ellen Martin在英國藍卡爾吉可哈姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1611年7月11日在英國英格蘭藍卡爾希阿培享年62歲，埋葬在英國藍卡爾希阿培。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Crook于大约1550年出生在英国藍卡爾博爾頓 勒 波斯 聖 彼得时，他的父亲George Crooke31岁，母亲Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe22岁。他于大约1565年与Ellen Martin在英国藍卡爾吉可哈姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1611年7月11日在英国英格兰藍卡爾希阿培享年62岁，埋葬在英国藍卡爾希阿培。

nameMeanings.name: Crook
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: topographic name from Old Norse krókr ‘nook or bend’ denoting someone who lived by a bend in a river or road. In some instances the surname may have arisen as a habitational name from any of the places called Crook in Cumberland and Durham, or Crooke in Lancashire, all of which are derived from this word.

topographic name for someone who lived ‘(at the) barrow or mound’ from Brittonic crüg. In some instances this may have arisen as a habitational name from either Crook in Combe Raleigh or perhaps Crooke in North Tawton (both Devon), which are derived from this word.

variants.name: Crooker
meanings: English: from an agent derivative of Middle English crok ‘bend’ (Old Norse krókr ‘hook, bend’), probably applied as a topographic name for someone who lived at a bend; compare Crook .

variants.name: Croxton
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places in Cambridgeshire, Cheshire, Lincolnshire, Leicestershire, Norfolk, and Staffordshire named Croxton, from the Old Norse personal name Krókr (see Crook 3) or an Old English word crōc ‘nook’ + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, settlement’.

variants.name: Crooks
meanings: habitational name from Crookes in Sheffield (Yorkshire), named with Old Norse krókr ‘hook, bend’.
variant of Crook , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Croak
meanings: English and Irish: variant of   Crook  .
Americanized form of German   Krock   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

variants.name: Croke
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Brendan, Fergus, Kieran.

English (Lancashire) and Irish (Cork): variant of Crook . According to Woulfe, the English name was taken to Ireland in the 13th century; the Croke family settled in Kilkenny, Tipperary, and Cork, whilst Crooke represents a later immigration and is more widespread.
Americanized form of Polish   Krok   and German   Krock   or some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When William Crook was born about 1550, in Bolton le Moors St Peter, Lancashire, England, his father, George Crooke, was 31 and his mother, Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe, was 22. He married Ellen Martin about 1565, in Kirkham, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 3 daughters. He died on 11 July 1611, in Heapey, Lancashire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 62, and was buried in Heapey, Lancashire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Crook est né environ 1550, à Bolton le Moors St Peter, Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, George Crooke, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Ellen Martin environ 1565, à Kirkham, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé le 11 juillet 1611, à Heapey, Lancashire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Heapey, Lancashire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Crook um 1550 in Bolton le Moors St Peter, Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater George Crooke 31 und seine Mutter Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe 22. Er hat um 1565 in Kirkham, Lancashire, England Ellen Martin geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb am 11. ko.lifeSummary: William Crook(이)가 대략 1550년 영국 랭카실르 볼턴 일 무르스 스트 피터에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 George Crooke(은)는 31세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe(은)는 22세였다. 그는 대략 1565년 영국 랭카실르 커카에서 Ellen Martin(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1611년 7월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 랭카실르 히피에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 랭카실르 히피에 묻혔다.

pt.Ogbourne St Andrew, Wiltshire, England,: Ogbourne St Andrew, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Crook nasceu aproximadamente 1550, em Bolton le Moors St Peter, Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, George Crooke, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen Martin aproximadamente 1565, em Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 11 de julho de 1611, em Heapey, Lancashire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Heapey, Lancashire, Inglaterra.

ru.Bolton le Moors St Peter, Lancashire, En: болтон л мурс ст питир, ланкашир, Англия
ru.Ogbourne St Andrew, Wiltshire, England,: огбурн ст андрю, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Crook родился около 1550 г. в местности болтон л мурс ст питир, ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени George Crooke было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen Martin около 1565 г. в местности кирхам, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 3 дочери. Он умер 11 июля 1611 г. в местности хипи, ланкашир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности хипи, ланкашир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Crook nació aproximadamente 1550, en Bolton le Moors St Peter, Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, George Crooke, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Margaret Alice Burscoe Burstoe, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Ellen Martin aproximadamente 1565, en Kirkham, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 11 de julio de 1611, en Heapey, Lancashire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Heapey, Lancashire, Inglaterra.
